requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC Evidence for Networked Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩的OCPP互操作与EMC证据
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁的OCPP互操作與EMC證據

summary.en: Uruguay public or fleet EV chargers may need to interoperate with UTE or charge-point-operator back-office systems for monitoring, access control, fault notification, reporting, and load management. OCPP is the common international protocol for these networked charger functions, while IEC 61000-family EMC and power-quality evidence is relevant for grid-connected electrical equipment. The exact OCPP version, cybersecurity requirements, SIM/router requirements, meter integration, and acceptance tests should be confirmed with UTE, the CPO, or the tender owner.
summary.zh: 乌拉圭公共或车队电动汽车充电桩可能需要与UTE或充电点运营商后台系统互操作，以实现监控、访问控制、故障通知、报表和负载管理。OCPP是这些联网充电桩功能的常见国际协议，IEC 61000系列EMC和电能质量证据则与并网电气设备相关。具体OCPP版本、网络安全要求、SIM/路由器要求、电表集成和验收测试应向UTE、充电点运营商或招标方确认。
summary.zht: 烏拉圭公共或車隊電動汽車充電樁可能需要與UTE或充電點運營商後台系統互操作，以實現監控、訪問控制、故障通知、報表和負載管理。OCPP是這些聯網充電樁功能的常見國際協議，IEC 61000系列EMC和電能質量證據則與併網電氣設備相關。具體OCPP版本、網絡安全要求、SIM/路由器要求、電錶集成和驗收測試應向UTE、充電點運營商或招標方確認。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
UTE public charging network or tender integration requirements where applicable

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the battery management system. That vehicle-to-charger CAN protocol is not an OCPP back-office protocol and does not establish CCS2 or network-platform interoperability. China AC and DC chargers may support proprietary or OCPP back-office functions depending on operator requirements, but the Uruguay project must verify the exact OCPP profile, connector stack, meter data, and EMC reports.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的通信协议。该车桩CAN协议不是OCPP后台协议，也不能证明CCS2或网络平台互操作。中国交流和直流充电桩根据运营商要求可能支持私有或OCPP后台功能，但乌拉圭项目必须核实具体OCPP配置、接口栈、电表数据和EMC报告。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。該車樁CAN協議不是OCPP後台協議，也不能證明CCS2或網絡平台互操作。中國交流和直流充電樁根據運營商要求可能支持私有或OCPP後台功能，但烏拉圭項目必須核實具體OCPP配置、接口棧、電錶數據和EMC報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) charger firmware supports the OCPP version and profiles required by the Uruguay operator; (2) GB/T 27930 DC vehicle communication is replaced with the CCS2 / IEC communication stack where CCS2 is required; (3) EMC evidence aligns with IEC 61000 and IEC 61851-21-2 expectations; (4) remote monitoring, fault reporting, metering, load management, and cybersecurity settings pass project acceptance. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy Uruguay networked-charger interoperability.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持乌拉圭运营方要求的OCPP版本和配置；(2) 在要求CCS2时，将GB/T 27930直流车桩通信替换为CCS2 / IEC通信栈；(3) EMC证据符合IEC 61000和IEC 61851-21-2预期；(4) 远程监控、故障报告、计量、负载管理和网络安全设置通过项目验收。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足乌拉圭联网充电桩互操作。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持烏拉圭運營方要求的OCPP版本和配置；(2) 在要求CCS2時，將GB/T 27930直流車樁通訊替換為CCS2 / IEC通訊棧；(3) EMC證據符合IEC 61000和IEC 61851-21-2預期；(4) 遠程監控、故障報告、計量、負載管理和網絡安全設置通過項目驗收。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足烏拉圭聯網充電樁互操作。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory when required by UTE, a charge-point operator, tender, fleet owner, or site acceptance plan; EMC and power-quality evidence is normally expected for grid-connected EVSE
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not an OCPP back-office or CCS2 interoperability substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Uruguay networked chargers, confirm OCPP and EMC requirements at project level. GB/T 27930 vehicle communication is not a back-office protocol and cannot substitute for OCPP platform integration or IEC-family EMC evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对乌拉圭联网充电桩，应按项目确认OCPP和EMC要求。GB/T 27930车桩通信不是后台协议，不能替代OCPP平台集成或IEC体系EMC证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對烏拉圭聯網充電樁，應按項目確認OCPP和EMC要求。GB/T 27930車樁通訊不是後台協議，不能替代OCPP平台集成或IEC體系EMC證據。
